top_stories.title: Anthropic’s Claude reports widespread outage
top_stories.description: Anthropic's AI chatbot Claude experienced widespread service disruptions on Monday morning, with thousands of users reporting issues accessing the bot.
top_stories.author: Ram Iyer
top_stories.content: Anthropic's AI chatbot Claude experienced widespread service disruptions on Monday morning, with thousands of users reporting issues accessing the bot.

top_stories.title: Building a scalable virtual try-on solution using Amazon Nova on AWS: part 1
top_stories.description: In this post, we explore the virtual try-on capability now available in Amazon Nova Canvas, including sample code to get started quickly and tips to help get the best outputs.
top_stories.author: Amandine Annoye
top_stories.content: In this post, we explore the virtual try-on capability now available in Amazon Nova Canvas, including sample code to get started quickly and tips to help get the best outputs.

top_stories.title: Zilliz Cloud Brings BYOC to Azure
top_stories.description: Zilliz, the company behind Milvus, the world’s most widely adopted open-source vector database, today announced the general availability of Zilliz Cloud BYOC (Bring Your Own Cloud) on Microsoft Azure. With this launch, Zilliz Cloud BYOC is now available across AWS, Google Cloud Platform, and Microsoft Azure—making Zilliz the first managed vector database provider to support BYOC... The post Zilliz Cloud Brings BYOC to Azure first appeared on AI-Tech Park.
top_stories.author: PR Newswire
top_stories.content: Zilliz, the company behind Milvus, the world’s most widely adopted open-source vector database, today announced the general availability of Zilliz Cloud BYOC (Bring Your Own Cloud) on Microsoft Azure. With this launch, Zilliz Cloud BYOC is now available across AWS, Google Cloud Platform, and Microsoft Azure—making Zilliz the first managed vector database provider to support BYOC... The post Zilliz Cloud Brings BYOC to Azure first appeared on AI-Tech Park.

top_stories.title: Veracode Published 2026 State of Software Security Report
top_stories.description: High-Risk Vulnerabilities Spike 36% Year-Over-Year as Critical Security Debt Surges 20%, Signaling a Growing Crisis in Software Security Veracode, the global leader in application risk management, today released its 2026 State of Software Security Report, revealing the widening gap between how fast organizations build software and how fast they can secure... The post Veracode Published 2026 State of Software Security Report first appeared on AI-Tech Park.

top_stories.content: High-Risk Vulnerabilities Spike 36% Year-Over-Year as Critical Security Debt Surges 20%, Signaling a Growing Crisis in Software Security Veracode, the global leader in application risk management, today released its 2026 State of Software Security Report, revealing the widening gap between how fast organizations build software and how fast they can secure... top_stories.title: Learnings from COBOL modernization in the real world
top_stories.description: Delivering successful COBOL modernization requires a solution that can reverse engineer deterministically, produce validated and traceable specs, and help those specs flow into any AI-powered coding assistant for the forward engineering. A successful modernization requires both reverse engineering and forward engineering. Learn more about COBOL in this post.
top_stories.author: Dr. Asa Kalavade
top_stories.content: Delivering successful COBOL modernization requires a solution that can reverse engineer deterministically, produce validated and traceable specs, and help those specs flow into any AI-powered coding assistant for the forward engineering. A successful modernization requires both reverse engineering and forward engineering. Learn more about COBOL in this post.
